parameters.query:
INSERT INTO app.country_expats (destination_iso3, origin_iso3, migrant_count, year)
SELECT c1.iso_alpha3, c2.iso_alpha3, $3, 2020
FROM app.countries c1, app.countries c2
WHERE (LOWER(c1.name) = LOWER($1) OR c1.name ILIKE $1 || '%')
  AND (LOWER(c2.name) = LOWER($2) OR c2.name ILIKE $2 || '%')
ON CONFLICT (destination_iso3, origin_iso3, year) 
DO UPDATE SET migrant_count = EXCLUDED.migrant_count;
